name: BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund
fullName: BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund Ltd.
description: BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund Ltd. is a tokenized pooled investment fund associated with U.S. Treasury debt exposure. Its stated objective is to seek current income consistent with liquidity and stability of principal.
issuerName: BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund Ltd.
